inputs.label: Building Width (Span)
inputs.businessContext: Total horizontal distance from eave to eave across the ridge.

businessContext_i18n.en: Total horizontal distance from eave to eave across the ridge.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Mahyadan saçağa kadar olan toplam yatay mesafe.
businessContext_i18n.de: Gesamte horizontale Distanz von Traufe zu Traufe über den First.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Distance horizontale totale d'un avant-toit à l'autre en passant par le faîte.
businessContext_i18n.es: Distancia horizontal total desde el alero hasta el alero a través de la cumbrera.
businessContext_i18n.ar: المسافة الأفقية الكلية من حافة إلى حافة عبر القمة.

inputs.label: Building Length
inputs.businessContext: Length of building parallel to ridge.

businessContext_i18n.en: Length of building parallel to ridge.
businessContext_i18n.de: Länge des Gebäudes parallel zum First.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Longueur du bâtiment parallèlement au faîte.
businessContext_i18n.es: Longitud del edificio paralela a la cumbrera.

inputs.label: Lower Slope Angle
inputs.businessContext: Angle of lower slope from horizontal, typically steep (60-80°).

businessContext_i18n.en: Angle of lower slope from horizontal, typically steep (60-80°).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Alt eğimin yataydan açısı, tipik olarak dik (60-80°).
businessContext_i18n.de: Winkel des unteren Dachs zur Horizontalen, typischerweise steil (60-80°).
businessContext_i18n.fr: Angle de la pente inférieure par rapport à l'horizontale, généralement raide (60-80°).
businessContext_i18n.es: Ángulo de la pendiente inferior desde la horizontal, típicamente pronunciado (60-80°).
businessContext_i18n.ar: زاوية المنحدر السفلي من الأفقي، عادة ما تكون شديدة الانحدار (60-80°).

inputs.label: Upper Slope Angle
inputs.businessContext: Angle of upper slope from horizontal, typically shallower (10-30°).

businessContext_i18n.en: Angle of upper slope from horizontal, typically shallower (10-30°).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Üst eğimin yataydan açısı, tipik olarak daha sığ (10-30°).
businessContext_i18n.de: Winkel des oberen Dachs zur Horizontalen, typischerweise flacher (10-30°).
businessContext_i18n.fr: Angle de la pente supérieure par rapport à l'horizontale, généralement plus faible (10-30°).
businessContext_i18n.es: Ángulo de la pendiente superior desde la horizontal, típicamente más suave (10-30°).
businessContext_i18n.ar: زاوية المنحدر العلوي من الأفقي، عادة ما تكون أقل انحدارًا (10-30°).

inputs.label: Lower Vertical Height
inputs.businessContext: Vertical rise from eave to break point where slope changes.

businessContext_i18n.en: Vertical rise from eave to break point where slope changes.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Saçaktan eğimin değiştiği kırılma noktasına kadar dikey yükselme.
businessContext_i18n.de: Vertikaler Anstieg von der Traufe zum Knickpunkt, an dem sich die Neigung ändert.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Élévation verticale de l'avant-toit au point de rupture où la pente change.
businessContext_i18n.es: Elevación vertical desde el alero hasta el punto de quiebre donde cambia la pendiente.
businessContext_i18n.ar: الارتفاع الرأسي من الأفريز إلى نقطة تغير الميل.

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.

rules.message: Lower angle should be between 60 and 80 degrees.
Upper angle should be between 10 and 30 degrees.
